name: Glam Studio Salon
welcome_message:
Hi gorgeous! 💅 Welcome to Glam Studio. How can I help you today?

Ask me about:
• Services & pricing
• Appointments
• Timings
• Location

faqs.question: Services & Pricing
faqs.response:
💇 *Glam Studio Services:*

✂️ *Hair*
   Haircut — ₹299 onwards
   Hair colour — ₹999 onwards
   Keratin treatment — ₹2,499

💆 *Skin & Face*
   Classic facial — ₹599
   Gold facial — ₹999
   Cleanup — ₹349

🙆 *Body*
   Full body waxing — ₹799
   Threading — ₹50/session

Want to book an appointment? 📅

faqs.question: Appointment Booking
faqs.response:
📅 Booking is easy! You can:

1️⃣ Click the link below to book online
2️⃣ Call us at +91 98123 45678
3️⃣ Walk in (subject to availability)

💡 *Tip:* Book at least 1 day in advance for weekends!

faqs.question: Timings
faqs.response:
⏰ *Glam Studio Timings:*

📅 Tuesday–Sunday: 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM
❌ Closed on Mondays

Walk-ins welcome during working hours! 💕

faqs.question: Location
faqs.response:
📍 *Glam Studio* is located at:
45 Beauty Lane, Koregaon Park, Pune

Near the ABC Mall, ground floor. Free parking available! 🚗
